'''chorathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:voicist|voicist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voicist|voicist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chorathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chorathithi|chorathithi]] || [[word:chorathiji|chorathiji]] || [[word:chorathishi|chorathishi]] || [[word:chorathiki|chorathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chorathuthuthu|chorathuthuthu]] || [[word:chorathujuju|chorathujuju]] || [[word:chorathushushu|chorathushushu]] || [[word:chorathukuku|chorathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chorathuthu|chorathuthu]] || [[word:chorathuju|chorathuju]] || [[word:chorathushu|chorathushu]] || [[word:chorathuku|chorathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chorathufthuf|chorathufthuf]] || [[word:chorathufjuf|chorathufjuf]] || [[word:chorathufshuf|chorathufshuf]] || [[word:chorathufkuf|chorathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chorathethe|chorathethe]] || [[word:choratheje|choratheje]] || [[word:choratheshe|choratheshe]] || [[word:choratheke|choratheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chorathothotho|chorathothotho]] || [[word:chorathojojo|chorathojojo]] || [[word:chorathoshosho|chorathoshosho]] || [[word:chorathokoko|chorathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chorathotho|chorathotho]] || [[word:chorathojo|chorathojo]] || [[word:chorathosho|chorathosho]] || [[word:chorathoko|chorathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chorathofthof|chorathofthof]] || [[word:chorathofjof|chorathofjof]] || [[word:chorathofshof|chorathofshof]] || [[word:chorathofkof|chorathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfthĂŻf|chorathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfjĂŻf|chorathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfshĂŻf|chorathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfkĂŻf|chorathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chorathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chorathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chorathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chorathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfthĂŻf|chorathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfjĂŻf|chorathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfshĂŻf|chorathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfkĂŻf|chorathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfthĂŻf|chorathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfjĂŻf|chorathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfshĂŻf|chorathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chorathĂŻfkĂŻf|chorathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chorathĂŠthĂŠ|chorathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chorathĂŠjĂŠ|chorathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chorathĂŠshĂŠ|chorathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chorathĂŠkĂŠ|chorathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chorathathatha|chorathathatha]] || [[word:chorathajaja|chorathajaja]] || [[word:chorathashasha|chorathashasha]] || [[word:chorathakaka|chorathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chorathatha|chorathatha]] || [[word:chorathaja|chorathaja]] || [[word:chorathasha|chorathasha]] || [[word:chorathaka|chorathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chorathafthaf|chorathafthaf]] || [[word:chorathafjaf|chorathafjaf]] || [[word:chorathafshaf|chorathafshaf]] || [[word:chorathafkaf|chorathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chorathasha|chorathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chorathshĂ«sha|chorathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chorathrosha|chorathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chorathmusha|chorathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chorathyasha|chorathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochorathnkshĂ«sha|gochorathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochorathnkrosha|gochorathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochorathnkmusha|gochorathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochorathnkyasha|gochorathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chorarathasha|chorarathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chorarathshĂ«sha|chorarathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chorarathrosha|chorarathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chorarathmusha|chorarathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chorarathyasha|chorarathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochorarathnkshĂ«sha|gochorarathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochorarathnkrosha|gochorarathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochorarathnkmusha|gochorarathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochorarathnkyasha|gochorarathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:cherĂŠthasha|cherĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:cherĂŠthshĂ«sha|cherĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:cherĂŠthrosha|cherĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:cherĂŠthmusha|cherĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:cherĂŠthyasha|cherĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gocherĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gocherĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gocherĂŠthnkrosha|gocherĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gocherĂŠthnkmusha|gocherĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gocherĂŠthnkyasha|gocherĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chorfathasha|chorfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chorfathshĂ«sha|chorfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chorfathrosha|chorfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chorfathmusha|chorfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chorfathyasha|chorfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochorfathnkshĂ«sha|gochorfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochorfathnkrosha|gochorfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochorfathnkmusha|gochorfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochorfathnkyasha|gochorfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
